title: crepis fraasii subsp. fraasii
intro: Crepis fraasii subsp. fraasii, a type of wildflower, is a biennial herbaceous plant belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Crepis fraasii subsp. fraasii include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
